items.title: Explaining NBA "Mutual Options":
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Explaining NBA "Mutual Options":

Not an actual CBA term, but a good descriptor for what's becoming a popular trend in the NBA. What happens is that on the final year of a contract, the player has an option. But if they opt in, the deal is then partially/non-guaranteed. Thus = mutual option.

items.title: Nikola Vucevic is returning to the Orlando Magic, per Shams.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Nikola Vucevic is returning to the Orlando Magic, per Shams.

Vuc was a consummate pro in Boston. It just didn’t work out. Fracturing his ring finger had a lot to do with that.

Cool seeing him go back to Orlando, where his career took off and he became an All-Star.

items.title: July 1, 1984: The U.S. Olympic basketball team defeats a team of NBA players, 94-90, in an exhibition game at the Metrodome in Minneapolis.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
July 1, 1984: The U.S. Olympic basketball team defeats a team of NBA players, 94-90, in an exhibition game at the Metrodome in Minneapolis.

Sam Perkins (University of North Carolina) scored 16 PTS to lead the Olympians. Kevin McHale scored a team-high 18 PTS for the NBA squad.

items.title: Free agent Moe Wagner has agreed to a two-year, $19 million deal with the Brooklyn Nets, sources tell ESPN. The deal contains a mutual option guaranteeing the $19M while allowing either side to opt-in (not opt-out) along with having a conversation about doing a new contract next
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Free agent Moe Wagner has agreed to a two-year, $19 million deal with the Brooklyn Nets, sources tell ESPN. The deal contains a mutual option guaranteeing the $19M while allowing either side to opt-in (not opt-out) along with having a conversation about doing a new contract next summer.

items.title: Orlando Magic salary cap situation after signing Nikola Vucevic.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Orlando Magic salary cap situation after signing Nikola Vucevic.

He'll earn $3.9 million but count as $2.4 million on their cap sheet.

This likely means Moe Wagner won't return.

They can fill their remaining roster spots with minimums and remain under the second apron.

items.title: Adding Conley doesn't change anything for any bigger plans for the Celtics. They can still use the full $15M Non-Taxpayer MLE or some (or all) of the $27.7M TPE.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Adding Conley doesn't change anything for any bigger plans for the Celtics. They can still use the full $15M Non-Taxpayer MLE or some (or all) of the $27.7M TPE.

I also wouldn't assume Conley being in the fold guarantees anyone else is getting traded. Good vet depth move.

items.title: Bulls fans have been conditioned that floor raising deals for a rebuilding team is idiotic. With new lottery rules, they now make sense. Finish with the 4th-10th worst record nets better odds than a bottom-3 record. You don’t want to bottom out. This is a 1 year deal with a team
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt: Bulls fans have been conditioned that floor raising deals for a rebuilding team is idiotic. With new lottery rules, they now make sense. Finish with the 4th-10th worst record nets better odds than a bottom-3 record. You don’t want to bottom out. This is a 1 year deal with a team option on 2nd year.

items.title: The Norm Powell deal is fine, but I am surprised the Bulls blew ~$55 million in cap space in the first 12 hours of free agency after BG's comments about staying flexible. If there were teams motivated to get off money, it wasn't going to happen immediately. Not an option anymore.
items.author: Ricky O'Donnell
items.body_excerpt: The Norm Powell deal is fine, but I am surprised the Bulls blew ~$55 million in cap space in the first 12 hours of free agency after BG's comments about staying flexible. If there were teams motivated to get off money, it wasn't going to happen immediately. Not an option anymore.

Ariel Hukporti got a little more than the veteran minimum for a player with 2 years of service.

The only way for Sixers to pay a player more than the minimum is to use a piece of the remaining MLE or the bi-annual exception.

items.title: Further evidence that the Pistons acquiring John Collins will be a S&T.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Further evidence that the Pistons acquiring John Collins will be a S&T.

In a S&T, a contract must be for three years, but only the first season has to be fully guaranteed.

Pistons could tie this into the Isaiah Stewart to Memphis trade, or as a part of something bigger. TBD!

items.title: I've come around on the Norm signing for the Bulls already. Have him show the kids how to work, then trade him at the deadline and get some pieces.
items.author: Eric Koreen
items.body_excerpt:
I've come around on the Norm signing for the Bulls already. Have him show the kids how to work, then trade him at the deadline and get some pieces.

The Bulls are, ahem, back.

items.title: Free agent center Ariel Hukporti has agreed to a one-year, $3.4 million deal with the Philadelphia 76ers, sources tell ESPN. Hukporti departs the Knicks after playing a reserve role on their title team, and gives the 76ers frontcourt depth and a high-motor, athletic big man.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets

items.title: Fever asst. Karima Christmas-Kelly is expecting her second child in the coming weeks, so the team has made two moves for added support & stability.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Fever asst. Karima Christmas-Kelly is expecting her second child in the coming weeks, so the team has made two moves for added support & stability.

Gary Kloppenburg returns as interim team advisor, and once Christmas-Kelly is away, Tully Bevilaqua is elevated to interim asst.

items.title: July 1, 1992: Charles Barkley of the U.S. men's Olympic basketball team with a steal and slam during the first half of a 128-87 win over Argentina in the Tournament of the Americas.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
July 1, 1992: Charles Barkley of the U.S. men's Olympic basketball team with a steal and slam during the first half of a 128-87 win over Argentina in the Tournament of the Americas.

Barkley scored 23 PTS as the "Dream Team" officially qualified for the '92 Olympics in Barcelona.

items.title: With the Lakers, LeBron played with three different players who had an assist rate north of 30% as his teammate: Rondo, Russ, Luka. Before that, he'd only had one — the god Jeff McInnis, in 2003.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt:
With the Lakers, LeBron played with three different players who had an assist rate north of 30% as his teammate: Rondo, Russ, Luka. Before that, he'd only had one — the god Jeff McInnis, in 2003.

None of this means anything. I just wanted you to see the name Jeff McInnis today.

items.title: Detroit Pistons salary cap situation after signing John Collins and Kevin Huerter.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Detroit Pistons salary cap situation after signing John Collins and Kevin Huerter.

They have $40 million in luxury tax space to re-sign Jalen Duren, but could create more room.

Collins is getting more than the mid-level exception, which means cap space or sign and trade.
